Bug / Task Description: Two related correctness and performance fixes in the Bloom filter package (pkg/bloom). (1) Fix a false-negative bug in CountingFilter: a counting Bloom filter must never report a previously-added, not-fully-removed element as absent, yet Remove decrements counters that have already saturated at their 4-bit maximum. Because a saturated counter has lost its true count, decrementing it can drive a still-referenced position to zero and produce a false negative. Ensure that once a counter reaches its ceiling it is treated as saturated and is no longer decremented, so membership is preserved across add/remove sequences. (2) Make Filter.FillRatio O(1) instead of scanning and popcounting the entire bit array on every call, by maintaining a cached count of set bits kept consistent across Add, Union, and Reset. The returned ratio must be identical to before. Preserve all exported names, signatures, serialization, and observable behavior.
Commit Subject: fix(bloom): prevent counting-filter false negatives and add O(1) fill ratio
